subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto them that have believed in God, the Almighty, the Self-Subsisting, that the attraction of its utterance may draw them unto the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیاخذه جذب البیان الی ملکوت
